decks.notes: This deck focuses on using a combination of discard spells, reanimation spells, and powerful combo pieces to quickly assemble a game-winning board state. By using cards like Deceit and Winternight Stories to discard key pieces into the graveyard, players can then use cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Requiting Hex to bring them back onto the battlefield for a devastating effect. With strong support cards like Bitter Triumph and Insatiable Avarice, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a powerful reanimated army while disrupting their plans with cards like Duress.

This deck focuses on quickly playing small creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, while using spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to deal damage to the opponent. It also includes cards like Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off to control the board and keep the opponent on the back foot. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and card advantage, utilizing card draw like Opt and Sleight of Hand to maintain tempo. The mana base is focused on being able to cast spells efficiently and consistently.

The focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of spell disruption, card draw, and removal. With cards like Abandon Attachments, Spell Snare, and Ral, Crackling Wit, the deck aims to counter and remove threats from the opponent while maintaining card advantage with Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent. Utilizing a mix of spells and creatures like Agna Qel'a and Gran-Gran, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and eventually finish them off with powerful finishers like It'll Quench Ya! and Combustion Technique.

The main concept of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and powerful creature cards, using cards like Earthbender Ascension, Mightform Harmonizer, and Sapling Nursery to quickly build a strong board presence. With cards like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo providing ramp and acceleration, this deck aims to play aggressively and efficiently to quickly outpace the opponent and secure victory. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Ba Sing Se and Archdruid's Charm provide additional support and versatility to adapt to different board states and strategies.

The deck focuses on using cheap spells and creatures to quickly build a board presence and deal damage to the opponent. It includes a mix of aggressive creatures like Elusive Otter and Drake Hatcher, along with efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Opt to control the board and keep up the pressure. The deck aims to outpace the opponent and overwhelm them with a combination of direct damage and evasive creatures. With a focus on tempo and aggression, this UR Aggro deck seeks to close out games quickly before the opponent can mount a defense.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence with efficient and aggressive creatures, while also utilizing various card advantage and mana ramp spells to stay ahead of the opponent. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures and quickly close out the game before they have a chance to stabilize. The deck includes spells that help to ramp up mana production, generate card advantage, and protect your creatures, while also including powerful finishers like Mossborn Hydra and Sandman, Shifting Scoundrel.

The main focus of this Temur Aggro deck is to play aggressive creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Wistfulness and Vibrance provide early creatures, while Burst Lightning and Sunderflock offer removal options. Flamebraider and Roaming Throne are strong attackers, supported by starting Town for card advantage. The deck also includes some utility cards like Bounce Off and Restless Vinestalk. Cavern of Souls helps ensure the creatures can't be countered, while Steam Vents and Breeding Pool provide the necessary mana fixing for this three-color deck. Overall, the strategy is to be fast and aggressive in order to win the game quickly.

The deck revolves around quickly developing a strong board presence using mana accelerants like Llanowar Elves and Nature's Rhythm. Quantum Riddler and Mockingbird provide early aggression, while Gene Pollinator and Badgermole Cub help maintain pressure. Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Marang River Regent offer powerful finishers, while Archdruid's Charm and Wistfulness provide utility and control options. The deck also includes support cards like Willowrush Verge and Multiversal Passage for consistency and flexibility. Overall, the strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and tempo plays while maintaining board control.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures like Deep-Cavern Bat and Gloomlake Verge, along with disruptive spells like Spell Snare and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian, to control the board and apply pressure to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Enduring Curiosity and Soulstone Sanctuary to maintain card advantage and resilience in longer games. By combining aggression with disruption and card advantage, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly while maintaining a strong board presence and ensuring consistent card draw.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively play creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, while using spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board and maintain tempo. Multiversal Passage and Riverpyre Verge help fix mana and ensure smooth land drops. Stormchaser's Talent and Stock Up provide additional card draw and potential for explosive plays. The inclusion of Secret Identity and Into the Flood Maw adds versatility and surprise factor to keep opponents on their toes. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly with a combination of creatures, spells, and efficient mana usage.

The focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. The deck utilizes card draw and bounce effects to maintain tempo and apply pressure. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, along with creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Elusive Otter, the deck aims to consistently pressure the opponent and control the board. The deck also includes land cards like Riverpyre Verge and Spirebluff Canal to ensure consistent mana production and enable powerful plays.

This deck focuses on using creatures with abilities that support each other and allow for quick and aggressive plays. The main strategy revolves around quickly ramping up mana and filling the board with creatures while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The combination of ramp spells, mana dorks, and strong creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Gene Pollinator make it possible to overwhelm the opponent with a high number of threats early on. The deck also includes card draw and versatile spells to maintain momentum and adapt to different situations.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through various counterspells, removal, and card draw while utilizing the tempo advantage provided by Eddymurk Crab and other disruptive creatures. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan by countering key spells and removing threats, ultimately outlasting the opponent and winning through incremental advantage and card advantage. The inclusion of versatile spells and mana fixing ensures the deck's flexibility and adaptability to different matchups, allowing it to maintain control and secure victory in the long game.

The key strategy of this deck is to quickly apply pressure on the opponent through aggressive creatures like Elusive Otter, Slickshot Show-Off, and Drake Hatcher, while utilizing spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to clear the way and deal direct damage. The deck also includes card draw and manipulation with Sleight of Hand, Opt, and Stock Up to ensure consistency in drawing threats and answers. Multiversal Passage and Riverpyre Verge provide mana fixing, while Secret Identity offers protection. Overall, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and maintain control of the game.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on using low-cost creatures and spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It utilizes cards like Shocking Sharpshooter and Fanatical Firebrand to chip away at the opponent's life total, while also having powerful finishers in Ojer Axonil and Stadium Headliner. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a quick and aggressive playstyle, while also having some removal options like Torch the Tower and Burst Lightning to clear the way for its creatures. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive game plan with a mix of Mountains and Sacred Foundry.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of spells and abilities to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building card advantage and board presence. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique, the deck aims to maintain control of the battlefield and outlast the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Gran-Gran and Iroh's Demonstration provide additional support and utility. Overall, this Izzet Control deck focuses on efficient removal and card draw to dominate the game.
